context: Tests whether the answer follows PencilKit serialization and content-version guidance for drawings synced across OS versions.

checklist.name: Drawing save
checklist.description: Uses PKDrawing.dataRepresentation() to persist editable drawing data.

checklist.name: Drawing load
checklist.description: Loads editable drawing data with throwing PKDrawing(data:) and handles load failures.

checklist.name: Required version
checklist.description: Checks requiredContentVersion before syncing or exposing editable data to older clients.

checklist.name: Canvas maximum
checklist.description: Sets maximumSupportedContentVersion on PKCanvasView when constraining drawing compatibility.

checklist.name: Picker maximum
checklist.description: Sets maximumSupportedContentVersion on PKToolPicker as well as on the canvas.

checklist.name: Version one
checklist.description: Maps version1 to older marker, pen, and pencil content.

checklist.name: Version two
checklist.description: Maps version2 to iPadOS 17-era inks including monoline, fountain pen, watercolor, and crayon.

checklist.name: Later versions
checklist.description: Recognizes later content versions as covering barrel-roll and Reed Pen-era features rather than the older iPadOS 17 inks.

checklist.name: Fallback policy
checklist.description: Provides a fallback/read-only preview or alternate drawing policy instead of assuming old clients can edit unsupported drawings.
